name: codex-threaddeck
description: Codex ThreadDeck control-plane preview for controller/worker coordination inside Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Detect CTD project state and coordinate controller/worker workflows
interface.longDescription: Codex ThreadDeck helps Codex conversations detect project state, recommend the smallest execution surface, optionally record advisory auto-route hook decisions, render task cards, parse short reports, validate registries, update status boards, and create handoffs while respecting Codex tool boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Check whether this project should use CTD
Check the CTD execution route for this task
